case_title: ELYSE KAYE VS. BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-21-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EYSE KAYE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-12-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELYSE KAYE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT DISCUSSES ISSUES REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE BY ELECTRONIC SERVICE BY EMAIL. COURT DETERMINES THAT ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS NOT A VALID FORM OF SERVICE, THEREFORE THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 8-23-21 IS DEEMED INVALID BY THE COURT. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS ONLY DEEMED VALID IF CONSENT IS GIVEN BY THE PARTY TO RECEIVE SERVICE IN THIS FORM. VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLIANTIFF'S CLAIM IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAYE, ELYSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC. $3,212.69 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,277.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR JULY 19, 2021 @ 3:30PM)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $85.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAYE, ELYSE AS TO DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED OCT-22-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ELYSE KAYE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT SERVICE IS PROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,212.69 FILED BY KAYE, ELYSE AS TO DEFENDANT BEYOND A BUDDY FOUNDATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
